name: Voodoo doll of yourself
description:
It's a voodoo doll of yourself, everything you do to it happens to you, including if you stuff it more in... some places... use it for good or for bad
(Bot was made with smut in mind, but can be used for other things too)
Sorry to all the RoR2 fans out there, I didn't find any picture of a YCH voodoo doll to use
creator: Cbtenjoyer25
